---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a context menu enhancement or code operation feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

Clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem/Use Case

What problem would this solve or what workflow would it improve?

**Current Workflow:**
Describe your current workflow and its pain points.

**Desired Workflow:**
Describe how the feature would improve your workflow.

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working?

**Implementation Details:**
Provide technical details or implementation ideas.

**UI/UX Considerations:**
How should this feature appear in the UI?

## Integration Location (check preferred)

- [ ] New right-click context menu option
- [ ] Enhancement to existing feature (Copy Function, Copy/Move, Save All, Terminal)
- [ ] Enhancement to Copy Function to File / Move Function to File
- [ ] Enhancement to Generators (Enum, Env, Cron, Naming)
- [ ] Command Palette only
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut
- [ ] Configuration setting
- [ ] Other: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

## Feature Type

- [ ] New core feature
- [ ] Enhancement to existing feature
- [ ] Code operation improvement
- [ ] Generator/utility addition
- [ ] Terminal integration feature
- [ ] Framework-specific feature
- [ ] Configuration option
- [ ] Other: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

## Examples

**Example 1:** [Specific use case scenario]
**Example 2:** [Another use case scenario]

**Before (Current):**

```
[Describe current behavior or code]
```

**After (With Feature):**

```
[Describe desired behavior or code]
```

## Technical Considerations

**Affected Components:**
Which services or managers would need changes?

- [ ] Code Analysis Service
- [ ] Configuration Service
- [ ] File Discovery Service
- [ ] File Save Service
- [ ] Terminal Service
- [ ] Project Detection Service
- [ ] Generator Services
- [ ] Extension Manager
- [ ] Context Menu Manager
- [ ] Other: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

**Breaking Changes:**

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Minor breaking changes (internal APIs)
- [ ] Requires migration guide

**Performance Impact:**

- [ ] Performance neutral
- [ ] Improves performance
- [ ] May have performance implications

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered other approaches?

**Alternative 1:**

```
[Describe alternative approach]
```

**Alternative 2:**

```
[Describe alternative approach]
```

**Why Proposed Solution is Better:**
Explain why your proposed solution is preferred.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, screenshots, or technical requirements.

**Mockups:**
[Attach UI mockups if applicable]

**Related Issues:**
[Link to related issues or discussions]

**Similar Features in Other Extensions:**
[If you've seen similar features in other extensions, mention them]

## Implementation Complexity

How complex do you think this feature would be?

- [ ] Simple - Can be implemented quickly
- [ ] Moderate - Requires some development time
- [ ] Complex - Significant development effort
- [ ] Very complex - Major architectural changes

## Priority

How important is this feature to your workflow?

- [ ] Critical - Blocking current workflow
- [ ] High - Significantly improves productivity
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Minor quality of life improvement

---

**Thank you for your feature request!** 🚀
